free_text: Cross sections for neutron induced, neutron producing
reactions in Li-6 and Li-7 at 5.96 and 9.83 MeV.
Pulsed tritium beam on hydrogen gas cell
Samples in thin aluminum holders, placed approximately
. Tungsten shadow bar used to shield detector from
direct gammas and neutrons. Standard pulse shape
discrimination used. Background eliminated using four
measurement method (gas refers to neutron source)-
data normalized,then TOF spectrum found from
NE-213 liquid scintillator in massive shield.
Plastic scintillator used to monitor neutron flux.
Current integrating system used As secondary neutron
used to obtain H cross sections for normalization.
Corrected for multiple scattering and background
OS. REACTION coding in subs.10,13 changed,
STATUS information added, BIB updates, converted to
